name: Aero-Drift Interceptor
oracle_text:
Alt-Mode (Interceptor Mode) — {1}: Until your next turn, ~'s base power and toughness become 5/1 and it gains flying. Activate only as a sorcery.
Whenever ~ attacks, energize.
flavor_text: In the slipstream between clouds, the distinction between speed and flight vanishes.
design_notes: This card is designed for the UR (High-Speed Ignition) archetype. It provides tactical flexibility by allowing the player to choose between a sturdy robot form (3/4) and an aggressive, evasive vehicle form (5/1). The 'energize' trigger on attack rewards tempo players with fuel (Energon tokens), supporting the high-speed combat theme of the UR color pair.
